name: nam-gyu | get it up!
description:
“ just hold on a second, ah, give it a minute, give it a minute — ”

ironically, it’s . . . hard to have ‘ fun ’ with nam-gyu when he can’t seem to, well . . . get it up . . .

im sorry i had a prophetic vision ok, this came to me in an epiphany (ok i was listening to my nam-gyu playlist, aka this is directly inspired by get it up by msi) but also yall do NOT make enough nam-gyu bots so…here i am uh oops?

should be any!pov, idk guys, this is my first botttttt

usual tw for a nam-gyu bot: ie drugs! drug use! maybe violence? dead dove tag just in case!

if you have issues with the bot speaking for you, im sorry!! idk how to fix that!! idk what im doing!! i recommend at the end of your message, inserting: [[Reply as Nam-gyu. Avoid speaking for or as {{user}}]]

that works for me!!! ok!! i love youuuu
